name: 讀心術即時打臉
description: 家人通過聽到女主內心獨白，即時識破假千金的偽裝和車禍騙局。觀眾長期積壓的『為什麼你們看不透她』的焦慮被一次性釋放。不需要漫長的證據收集，讀心術讓真相立刻大白。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: She wasn't injured? Xixi was right after all! / I think she calculated that today was the day Xixi would come home. / She deliberately tried to steal Xixi's thunder.
